name: Slash Command API
summary: Backend API for registering and executing slash commands
goals: Provide a registry of available slash commands with metadata
Execute slash commands and return results

specDetail.description: Backend endpoints for slash command management. GET /api/agents/slash-commands returns available commands. POST /api/agents/sessions/:sessionId/commands/:commandName executes a specific command.

parameters.name: commandName
parameters.description: Name of the slash command to execute (required)

constraints: Must validate command names against the registered command registry
Must enforce permission checks for privileged commands
Must return command results in a standardized format

acceptanceCriteria.then: a list of available commands with names, descriptions, and parameter schemas is returned

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
